steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student claims The Horse Fair marks a significant change in Bonheur's artistic development. The correct quotation must directly show that The Horse Fair divided her career — before versus after — not merely praise the painting or note its influence.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'paintings before The Horse Fair belong to her earlier style, to which she never returned': explicitly states a before/after shift in style caused by the painting. This directly supports the claim of a significant change. ✓
  • Choice B — 'none so clearly represents her abilities and ideas as The Horse Fair': says the painting is her best representative work, not that it changed her style. No contrast between before and after. ✗
  • Choice C — 'no two viewers seem to agree about exactly what the painting means': about interpretive disagreement among viewers, not about Bonheur's artistic development. ✗
  • Choice D — 'influenced by other artists...also an artist ahead of her time': about external influences and Bonheur's forward-looking quality, not a shift in her own style. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
